{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_019ZTRiTiqzHLYU2oHgJKsSC","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01VCdTPvYrw3iLhE7PqwaA8E","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/app/ars.R","content":"##############################################################################\n# Adaptive Rejection Sampling (ARS)\n# Reference: Gilks, W. R., & Wild, P. (1992). Adaptive rejection sampling\n#            for Gibbs sampling. JRSS Series C, 41(2), 337-348.\n#\n# Derivative-free implementation using chord-based upper hull construction.\n# Modular design with input validation and log-concavity checks.\n##############################################################################\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 1: Input Validation\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nvalidate_inputs <- function(n, f, lb, ub, x_init) {\n  if (!is.numeric(n) || length(n) != 1 || is.na(n))\n    stop(\"'n' must be a single numeric value.\")\n  if (n < 1 || n != floor(n))\n    stop(\"'n' must be a positive integer.\")\n  if (!is.function(f))\n    stop(\"'f' must be a function (density function).\")\n  if (!is.numeric(lb) || length(lb) != 1 || is.na(lb))\n    stop(\"'lb' must be a single numeric value (may be -Inf).\")\n  if (!is.numeric(ub) || length(ub) != 1 || is.na(ub))\n    stop(\"'ub' must be a single numeric value (may be Inf).\")\n  if (lb >= ub)\n    stop(\"'lb' must be strictly less than 'ub'.\")\n  if (!is.null(x_init)) {\n    if (!is.numeric(x_init) || length(x_init) < 2)\n      stop(\"'x_init' must be a numeric vector with at least 2 elements.\")\n    if (any(x_init <= lb) || any(x_init >= ub))\n      stop(\"All 'x_init' values must be strictly inside (lb, ub).\")\n  }\n  invisible(TRUE)\n}\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 2: Log-density Evaluation\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\neval_log_density <- function(f, x) {\n  vals <- suppressWarnings(f(x))\n  if (any(is.na(vals) | is.nan(vals)))\n    stop(\"Density function returned NA/NaN.\")\n  ifelse(vals > 0, log(vals), -Inf)\n}\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 3: Log-Concavity Check\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ncheck_log_concavity <- function(x, h) {\n  if (length(x) < 3) return(invisible(TRUE))\n  slopes <- diff(h) / diff(x)\n  if (any(diff(slopes) > 1e-6))\n    stop(\"Log-concavity violated: the supplied density does not appear to be log-concave.\")\n  invisible(TRUE)\n}\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 4: Initialize Abscissae\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ninitialize_abscissae <- function(f, lb, ub, x_init) {\n  if (!is.null(x_init)) {\n    x_init <- sort(unique(x_init))\n    h <- eval_log_density(f, x_init)\n    if (any(h == -Inf))\n      stop(\"Density is zero at one or more initial abscissae. Choose different starting points.\")\n    # Ensure at least 3 points for proper hull construction\n    if (length(x_init) < 3) {\n      mid <- (x_init[1] + x_init[2]) / 2\n      h_mid <- eval_log_density(f, mid)\n      if (h_mid > -Inf) {\n        x_init <- sort(c(x_init, mid))\n        h <- eval_log_density(f, x_init)\n      }\n    }\n    return(list(x = x_init, h = h))\n  }\n\n  # Automatic initialization: find points with positive density\n  if (is.finite(lb) && is.finite(ub)) {\n    candidates <- seq(lb + (ub - lb) * 0.05, ub - (ub - lb) * 0.05, length.out = 20)\n  } else if (is.finite(lb)) {\n    candidates <- lb + c(0.1, 0.5, 1, 2, 5, 10)\n  } else if (is.finite(ub)) {\n    candidates <- ub - c(10, 5, 2, 1, 0.5, 0.1)\n  } else {\n    candidates <- c(-6, -4, -2, -1, -0.5, 0, 0.5, 1, 2, 4, 6)\n  }\n\n  h_cand <- eval_log_density(f, candidates)\n  good <- which(h_cand > -Inf)\n  if (length(good) < 3)\n    stop(\"Could not find at least 3 initial points with positive density. Supply 'x_init'.\")\n\n  sel <- good\n  if (length(sel) > 7)\n    sel <- sel[round(seq(1, length(sel), length.out = 7))]\n\n  x_sel <- candidates[sel]\n  h_sel <- h_cand[sel]\n\n  # For unbounded domains, ensure the boundary slopes have correct sign\n  if (!is.finite(lb) && length(x_sel) >= 2) {\n    slope_left <- (h_sel[2] - h_sel[1]) / (x_sel[2] - x_sel[1])\n    if (slope_left <= 0) {\n      trial <- x_sel[1] - 2 * abs(x_sel[2] - x_sel[1])\n      h_trial <- eval_log_density(f, trial)\n      if (h_trial > -Inf && h_trial < h_sel[1]) {\n        x_sel <- c(trial, x_sel)\n        h_sel <- c(h_trial, h_sel)\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (!is.finite(ub) && length(x_sel) >= 2) {\n    k <- length(x_sel)\n    slope_right <- (h_sel[k] - h_sel[k - 1]) / (x_sel[k] - x_sel[k - 1])\n    if (slope_right >= 0) {\n      trial <- x_sel[k] + 2 * abs(x_sel[k] - x_sel[k - 1])\n      h_trial <- eval_log_density(f, trial)\n      if (h_trial > -Inf && h_trial < h_sel[k]) {\n        x_sel <- c(x_sel, trial)\n        h_sel <- c(h_sel, h_trial)\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (length(x_sel) < 3)\n    stop(\"Could not find at least 3 suitable initial abscissae. Supply 'x_init'.\")\n\n  list(x = x_sel, h = h_sel)\n}\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 5: Upper Hull (Piecewise-Linear Envelope)\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n#\n# For a log-concave function h with abscissae x_1 < ... < x_k:\n# Chord L_j connects (x_j, h_j) and (x_{j+1}, h_{j+1}), slope s_j.\n# By concavity, L_j lies ABOVE h outside [x_j, x_{j+1}] and BELOW inside.\n#\n# Upper hull construction:\n# - Left tail [lb, x_1]:        L_1 (extended left)\n# - [x_1, x_2]:                 L_2 (extended left of x_2)  [k >= 3]\n# - [x_j, x_{j+1}] (interior): min(L_{j-1}, L_{j+1}) split at z_j\n# - [x_{k-1}, x_k]:            L_{k-2} (extended right of x_{k-1})\n# - Right tail [x_k, ub]:       L_{k-1} (extended right)\n\ncompute_upper_hull <- function(x, h, lb, ub) {\n  k <- length(x)\n  s <- diff(h) / diff(x)\n  cc <- h[1:(k - 1)] - s * x[1:(k - 1)]\n\n  p_slopes <- numeric(0)\n  p_intercepts <- numeric(0)\n  p_left <- numeric(0)\n  p_right <- numeric(0)\n\n  add_piece <- function(sl, ic, l, r) {\n    p_slopes <<- c(p_slopes, sl)\n    p_intercepts <<- c(p_intercepts, ic)\n    p_left <<- c(p_left, l)\n    p_right <<- c(p_right, r)\n  }\n\n  # Left tail\n  add_piece(s[1], cc[1], lb, x[1])\n\n  if (k >= 3) {\n    # First boundary interval [x_1, x_2]: use chord L_2\n    add_piece(s[2], cc[2], x[1], x[2])\n\n    # Interior intervals\n    if (k >= 4) {\n      for (j in 2:(k - 2)) {\n        z <- (cc[j + 1] - cc[j - 1]) / (s[j - 1] - s[j + 1])\n        z <- max(z, x[j])\n        z <- min(z, x[j + 1])\n        add_piece(s[j - 1], cc[j - 1], x[j], z)\n        add_piece(s[j + 1], cc[j + 1], z, x[j + 1])\n      }\n    }\n\n    # Last boundary interval [x_{k-1}, x_k]: use chord L_{k-2}\n    add_piece(s[k - 2], cc[k - 2], x[k - 1], x[k])\n  } else {\n    # k == 2: use the single chord for the interior (crude)\n    add_piece(s[1], cc[1], x[1], x[2])\n  }\n\n  # Right tail\n  add_piece(s[k - 1], cc[k - 1], x[k], ub)\n\n  list(\n    slopes = p_slopes, intercepts = p_intercepts,\n    left = p_left, right = p_right,\n    n_pieces = length(p_slopes)\n  )\n}\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 6: Evaluate Upper Hull at a Point\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\neval_upper_hull <- function(t, hull) {\n  for (i in seq_len(hull$n_pieces)) {\n    if (t >= hull$left[i] && t <= hull$right[i]) {\n      return(hull$slopes[i] * t + hull$intercepts[i])\n    }\n  }\n  # Fallback: find closest piece\n  for (i in seq_len(hull$n_pieces)) {\n    if ((i == 1 && t <= hull$right[i]) ||\n        (i == hull$n_pieces && t >= hull$left[i])) {\n      return(hull$slopes[i] * t + hull$intercepts[i])\n    }\n  }\n  return(Inf)\n}\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 7: Lower Hull (Squeezing Function)\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\neval_lower_hull <- function(t, x, h) {\n  k <- length(x)\n  if (t < x[1] || t > x[k]) return(-Inf)\n  j <- findInterval(t, x, rightmost.closed = TRUE)\n  j <- min(j, k - 1)\n  j <- max(j, 1)\n  h[j] + (h[j + 1] - h[j]) / (x[j + 1] - x[j]) * (t - x[j])\n}\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 8: Sample from Upper Hull\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nsample_upper_hull <- function(hull) {\n  np <- hull$n_pieces\n\n  # Compute log-integral of exp(s*t + c) on each piece\n  log_integrals <- numeric(np)\n  for (i in 1:np) {\n    a <- hull$left[i]\n    b <- hull$right[i]\n    si <- hull$slopes[i]\n    ci <- hull$intercepts[i]\n\n    if (!is.finite(a) && !is.finite(b)) {\n      log_integrals[i] <- -Inf\n      next\n    }\n\n    if (abs(si) < 1e-12) {\n      if (is.finite(a) && is.finite(b)) {\n        log_integrals[i] <- ci + log(max(b - a, 1e-300))\n      } else {\n        log_integrals[i] <- -Inf\n      }\n    } else {\n      if (!is.finite(a)) {\n        if (si > 0) {\n          log_integrals[i] <- ci + si * b - log(si)\n        } else {\n          log_integrals[i] <- -Inf\n        }\n      } else if (!is.finite(b)) {\n        if (si < 0) {\n          log_integrals[i] <- ci + si * a - log(-si)\n        } else {\n          log_integrals[i] <- -Inf\n        }\n      } else {\n        # Both finite: integral = exp(ci)/si * [exp(si*b) - exp(si*a)]\n        if (si > 0) {\n          log_integrals[i] <- ci + si * b + log(1 - exp(si * (a - b))) - log(si)\n        } else {\n          log_integrals[i] <- ci + si * a + log(1 - exp(si * (b - a))) - log(-si)\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  # Normalize to get piece probabilities\n  valid <- which(is.finite(log_integrals) & log_integrals > -Inf)\n  if (length(valid) == 0) stop(\"No valid upper hull pieces for sampling.\")\n\n  max_li <- max(log_integrals[valid])\n  weights <- rep(0, np)\n  weights[valid] <- exp(log_integrals[valid] - max_li)\n  probs <- weights / sum(weights)\n\n  # Select piece\n  idx <- sample.int(np, size = 1, prob = probs)\n  a <- hull$left[idx]\n  b <- hull$right[idx]\n  si <- hull$slopes[idx]\n  ci <- hull$intercepts[idx]\n\n  # Sample from truncated exponential on [a, b]\n  u <- runif(1)\n  if (abs(si) < 1e-12) {\n    t_star <- a + u * (b - a)\n  } else {\n    if (!is.finite(a)) {\n      t_star <- b + log(u) / si\n    } else if (!is.finite(b)) {\n      t_star <- a - log(1 - u) / (-si)\n    } else {\n      exp_a <- exp(si * a)\n      exp_b <- exp(si * b)\n      t_star <- log(exp_a + u * (exp_b - exp_a)) / si\n    }\n  }\n\n  log_u_star <- si * t_star + ci\n  list(x_star = t_star, log_u = log_u_star)\n}\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 9: Update Abscissae\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nupdate_abscissae <- function(x_star, h_star, x, h) {\n  pos <- findInterval(x_star, x) + 1\n  x_new <- append(x, x_star, after = pos - 1)\n  h_new <- append(h, h_star, after = pos - 1)\n  list(x = x_new, h = h_new)\n}\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 10: Main ARS Function\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nars <- function(n, f, lb = -Inf, ub = Inf, x_init = NULL) {\n  validate_inputs(n, f, lb, ub, x_init)\n\n  init <- initialize_abscissae(f, lb, ub, x_init)\n  x_abs <- init$x\n  h_abs <- init$h\n  check_log_concavity(x_abs, h_abs)\n\n  samples <- numeric(n)\n  i <- 1\n\n  while (i <= n) {\n    hull <- compute_upper_hull(x_abs, h_abs, lb, ub)\n    proposal <- sample_upper_hull(hull)\n    x_star <- proposal$x_star\n    log_u_star <- proposal$log_u\n\n    l_star <- eval_lower_hull(x_star, x_abs, h_abs)\n    w <- runif(1)\n\n    if (log(w) <= l_star - log_u_star) {\n      samples[i] <- x_star\n      i <- i + 1\n    } else {\n      h_star <- eval_log_density(f, x_star)\n\n      if (log(w) <= h_star - log_u_star) {\n        samples[i] <- x_star\n        i <- i + 1\n      }\n\n      updated <- update_abscissae(x_star, h_star, x_abs, h_abs)\n      x_abs <- updated$x\n      h_abs <- updated$h\n      check_log_concavity(x_abs, h_abs)\n    }\n  }\n\n  samples\n}\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 11: Test Function\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ntest <- function() {\n  cat(\"============================================================\\n\")\n  cat(\"  Adaptive Rejection Sampler (ARS) - Test Suite\\n\")\n  cat(\"============================================================\\n\\n\")\n\n  n_samples <- 5000\n  ks_alpha <- 0.001\n\n  run_distribution_test <- function(test_name, f, lb, ub, ref_cdf,\n                                     true_mean, true_sd, x_init = NULL) {\n    cat(sprintf(\"Testing: %s\\n\", test_name))\n    result <- tryCatch({\n      samples <- ars(n = n_samples, f = f, lb = lb, ub = ub, x_init = x_init)\n      ks <- ks.test(samples, ref_cdf)\n      samp_mean <- mean(samples)\n      samp_sd <- sd(samples)\n      cat(sprintf(\"  Sample mean = %.4f (true = %.4f)\\n\", samp_mean, true_mean))\n      cat(sprintf(\"  Sample SD   = %.4f (true = %.4f)\\n\", samp_sd, true_sd))\n      cat(sprintf(\"  KS p-value  = %.4f\\n\", ks$p.value))\n\n      mean_ok <- abs(samp_mean - true_mean) < 3 * true_sd / sqrt(n_samples) + 0.15\n      sd_ok <- abs(samp_sd - true_sd) / true_sd < 0.25\n      ks_ok <- ks$p.value > ks_alpha\n\n      if (ks_ok && mean_ok && sd_ok) {\n        cat(sprintf(\"%s: PASS\\n\\n\", test_name))\n        list(passed = TRUE, samples = samples)\n      } else {\n        reasons <- c()\n        if (!ks_ok) reasons <- c(reasons, \"KS test rejected\")\n        if (!mean_ok) reasons <- c(reasons, \"mean off\")\n        if (!sd_ok) reasons <- c(reasons, \"SD off\")\n        cat(sprintf(\"%s: FAIL (%s)\\n\\n\", test_name, paste(reasons, collapse = \", \")))\n        list(passed = FALSE, samples = samples)\n      }\n    }, error = function(e) {\n      cat(sprintf(\"  Error: %s\\n\", e$message))\n      cat(sprintf(\"%s: FAIL (error)\\n\\n\", test_name))\n      list(passed = FALSE, samples = NULL)\n    })\n    result\n  }\n\n  passed <- 0\n  total <- 0\n\n  # Test 1: Standard Normal N(0,1)\n  total <- total + 1\n  res <- run_distribution_test(\n    \"Standard_Normal\", dnorm, -Inf, Inf, pnorm, 0, 1\n  )\n  if (res$passed) passed <- passed + 1\n  if (!is.null(res$samples))\n    writeLines(as.character(res$samples), \"/app/normal_samples.txt\")\n\n  # Test 2: Normal(3, 2)\n  total <- total + 1\n  res <- run_distribution_test(\n    \"Normal_mu3_sd2\",\n    function(x) dnorm(x, mean = 3, sd = 2), -Inf, Inf,\n    function(x) pnorm(x, mean = 3, sd = 2), 3, 2\n  )\n  if (res$passed) passed <- passed + 1\n\n  # Test 3: Exponential(1)\n  total <- total + 1\n  res <- run_distribution_test(\n    \"Exponential_rate1\", dexp, 0, Inf, pexp, 1, 1,\n    x_init = c(0.5, 1, 3)\n  )\n  if (res$passed) passed <- passed + 1\n  if (!is.null(res$samples))\n    writeLines(as.character(res$samples), \"/app/exponential_samples.txt\")\n\n  # Test 4: Gamma(5, 1)\n  total <- total + 1\n  res <- run_distribution_test(\n    \"Gamma_shape5_rate1\",\n    function(x) dgamma(x, shape = 5, rate = 1), 0, Inf,\n    function(x) pgamma(x, shape = 5, rate = 1),\n    5, sqrt(5), x_init = c(1, 3, 5, 8)\n  )\n  if (res$passed) passed <- passed + 1\n\n  # Test 5: Beta(2, 5)\n  total <- total + 1\n  res <- run_distribution_test(\n    \"Beta_2_5\",\n    function(x) dbeta(x, 2, 5), 0, 1,\n    function(x) pbeta(x, 2, 5),\n    2 / 7, sqrt(10 / (49 * 8)), x_init = c(0.1, 0.3, 0.6)\n  )\n  if (res$passed) passed <- passed + 1\n\n  # Test 6: Truncated Normal on (-2, 2)\n  total <- total + 1\n  Z <- pnorm(2) - pnorm(-2)\n  trunc_sd <- sqrt(1 - 2 * 2 * dnorm(2) / Z)\n  res <- run_distribution_test(\n    \"Truncated_Normal_-2_2\", dnorm, -2, 2,\n    function(x) (pnorm(pmin(pmax(x, -2), 2)) - pnorm(-2)) / Z,\n    0, trunc_sd, x_init = c(-1, 0, 1)\n  )\n  if (res$passed) passed <- passed + 1\n\n  # Test 7: Logistic distribution\n  total <- total + 1\n  res <- run_distribution_test(\n    \"Logistic_0_1\", dlogis, -Inf, Inf, plogis, 0, pi / sqrt(3)\n  )\n  if (res$passed) passed <- passed + 1\n\n  # ==================================================================\n  # Input Validation Tests\n  # ==================================================================\n  cat(\"--- Input Validation Tests ---\\n\\n\")\n\n  total <- total + 1\n  cat(\"Testing: Negative_n_rejected\\n\")\n  tryCatch({\n    ars(n = -5, f = dnorm)\n    cat(\"Negative_n_rejected: FAIL (no error raised)\\n\\n\")\n  }, error = function(e) {\n    cat(sprintf(\"  Caught: %s\\n\", e$message))\n    cat(\"Negative_n_rejected: PASS\\n\\n\")\n    passed <<- passed + 1\n  })\n\n  total <- total + 1\n  cat(\"Testing: Non_function_f_rejected\\n\")\n  tryCatch({\n    ars(n = 100, f = \"not_a_function\")\n    cat(\"Non_function_f_rejected: FAIL (no error raised)\\n\\n\")\n  }, error = function(e) {\n    cat(sprintf(\"  Caught: %s\\n\", e$message))\n    cat(\"Non_function_f_rejected: PASS\\n\\n\")\n    passed <<- passed + 1\n  })\n\n  total <- total + 1\n  cat(\"Testing: Invalid_domain_rejected\\n\")\n  tryCatch({\n    ars(n = 100, f = dnorm, lb = 5, ub = 2)\n    cat(\"Invalid_domain_rejected: FAIL (no error raised)\\n\\n\")\n  }, error = function(e) {\n    cat(sprintf(\"  Caught: %s\\n\", e$message))\n    cat(\"Invalid_domain_rejected: PASS\\n\\n\")\n    passed <<- passed + 1\n  })\n\n  total <- total + 1\n  cat(\"Testing: Non_log_concave_rejected\\n\")\n  tryCatch({\n    ars(n = 100, f = dcauchy, lb = -Inf, ub = Inf,\n        x_init = c(-5, -1, 0, 1, 5))\n    cat(\"Non_log_concave_rejected: FAIL (no error raised)\\n\\n\")\n  }, error = function(e) {\n    cat(sprintf(\"  Caught: %s\\n\", e$message))\n    cat(\"Non_log_concave_rejected: PASS\\n\\n\")\n    passed <<- passed + 1\n  })\n\n  total <- total + 1\n  cat(\"Testing: Zero_n_rejected\\n\")\n  tryCatch({\n    ars(n = 0, f = dnorm)\n    cat(\"Zero_n_rejected: FAIL (no error raised)\\n\\n\")\n  }, error = function(e) {\n    cat(sprintf(\"  Caught: %s\\n\", e$message))\n    cat(\"Zero_n_rejected: PASS\\n\\n\")\n    passed <<- passed + 1\n  })\n\n  total <- total + 1\n  cat(\"Testing: Init_outside_domain_rejected\\n\")\n  tryCatch({\n    ars(n = 100, f = dnorm, lb = 0, ub = 10, x_init = c(-1, 5))\n    cat(\"Init_outside_domain_rejected: FAIL (no error raised)\\n\\n\")\n  }, error = function(e) {\n    cat(sprintf(\"  Caught: %s\\n\", e$message))\n    cat(\"Init_outside_domain_rejected: PASS\\n\\n\")\n    passed <<- passed + 1\n  })\n\n  # ==================================================================\n  # Module Tests\n  # ==================================================================\n  cat(\"--- Module Tests ---\\n\\n\")\n\n  # Test: upper hull >= log-density everywhere\n  total <- total + 1\n  cat(\"Testing: Hull_evaluation\\n\")\n  tryCatch({\n    x_test <- c(-3, -1, 0, 1, 3)\n    h_test <- eval_log_density(dnorm, x_test)\n    hull <- compute_upper_hull(x_test, h_test, -Inf, Inf)\n\n    test_pts <- seq(-4, 4, by = 0.25)\n    for (xi in test_pts) {\n      u_val <- eval_upper_hull(xi, hull)\n      h_val <- eval_log_density(dnorm, xi)\n      if (u_val < h_val - 1e-6) {\n        stop(sprintf(\"Upper hull below log-density at x=%.2f: u=%.4f < h=%.4f\",\n                      xi, u_val, h_val))\n      }\n    }\n\n    # Lower hull <= log-density at interior points\n    for (xi in seq(-2.5, 2.5, by = 0.5)) {\n      l_val <- eval_lower_hull(xi, x_test, h_test)\n      h_val <- eval_log_density(dnorm, xi)\n      if (l_val > h_val + 1e-6) {\n        stop(sprintf(\"Lower hull above log-density at x=%.2f\", xi))\n      }\n    }\n\n    cat(\"  Upper hull >= log-density: OK\\n\")\n    cat(\"  Lower hull <= log-density: OK\\n\")\n    cat(\"Hull_evaluation: PASS\\n\\n\")\n    passed <<- passed + 1\n  }, error = function(e) {\n    cat(sprintf(\"  Error: %s\\n\", e$message))\n    cat(\"Hull_evaluation: FAIL\\n\\n\")\n  })\n\n  # Test: log-concavity detection\n  total <- total + 1\n  cat(\"Testing: Log_concavity_detection\\n\")\n  tryCatch({\n    x_bimodal <- c(-3, -1, 0, 1, 3)\n    h_bimodal <- log(0.5 * dnorm(x_bimodal, -2) + 0.5 * dnorm(x_bimodal, 2))\n    err_caught <- FALSE\n    tryCatch(check_log_concavity(x_bimodal, h_bimodal),\n             error = function(e) err_caught <<- TRUE)\n    if (err_caught) {\n      cat(\"  Bimodal density correctly rejected\\n\")\n      cat(\"Log_concavity_detection: PASS\\n\\n\")\n      passed <<- passed + 1\n    } else {\n      cat(\"Log_concavity_detection: FAIL\\n\\n\")\n    }\n  }, error = function(e) {\n    cat(sprintf(\"  Error: %s\\n\", e$message))\n    cat(\"Log_concavity_detection: FAIL\\n\\n\")\n  })\n\n  # Test: update_abscissae maintains sorted order\n  total <- total + 1\n  cat(\"Testing: Update_abscissae_sorted\\n\")\n  tryCatch({\n    x0 <- c(1, 3, 5, 7)\n    h0 <- c(-1, -0.5, -0.5, -1)\n    upd <- update_abscissae(4, -0.6, x0, h0)\n    if (all(diff(upd$x) > 0) && length(upd$x) == 5 && upd$x[3] == 4) {\n      cat(\"  Sorted order maintained after insertion\\n\")\n      cat(\"Update_abscissae_sorted: PASS\\n\\n\")\n      passed <<- passed + 1\n    } else {\n      cat(\"Update_abscissae_sorted: FAIL\\n\\n\")\n    }\n  }, error = function(e) {\n    cat(sprintf(\"  Error: %s\\n\", e$message))\n    cat(\"Update_abscissae_sorted: FAIL\\n\\n\")\n  })\n\n  cat(\"============================================================\\n\")\n  cat(sprintf(\"  Results: %d / %d tests passed\\n\", passed, total))\n  cat(\"============================================================\\n\")\n  invisible(passed == total)\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1072,"cache_read_input_tokens":37425,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":1072,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":8,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"8b99dc74-7309-4fed-a44e-e826f7a44ba3","uuid":"2492f30d-b2d1-4928-868d-a41cd9063b4a"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01VCdTPvYrw3iLhE7PqwaA8E","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /app/ars.R has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"8b99dc74-7309-4fed-a44e-e826f7a44ba3","uuid":"6c3fb9da-104d-4b1e-bc34-65ea471df3ae","tool_use_result":{"type":"update","filePath":"/app/ars.R","content":"##############################################################################\n# Adaptive Rejection Sampling (ARS)\n# Reference: Gilks, W. R., & Wild, P. (1992). Adaptive rejection sampling\n#            for Gibbs sampling. JRSS Series C, 41(2), 337-348.\n#\n# Derivative-free implementation using chord-based upper hull construction.\n# Modular design with input validation and log-concavity checks.\n##############################################################################\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 1: Input Validation\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nvalidate_inputs <- function(n, f, lb, ub, x_init) {\n  if (!is.numeric(n) || length(n) != 1 || is.na(n))\n    stop(\"'n' must be a single numeric value.\")\n  if (n < 1 || n != floor(n))\n    stop(\"'n' must be a positive integer.\")\n  if (!is.function(f))\n    stop(\"'f' must be a function (density function).\")\n  if (!is.numeric(lb) || length(lb) != 1 || is.na(lb))\n    stop(\"'lb' must be a single numeric value (may be -Inf).\")\n  if (!is.numeric(ub) || length(ub) != 1 || is.na(ub))\n    stop(\"'ub' must be a single numeric value (may be Inf).\")\n  if (lb >= ub)\n    stop(\"'lb' must be strictly less than 'ub'.\")\n  if (!is.null(x_init)) {\n    if (!is.numeric(x_init) || length(x_init) < 2)\n      stop(\"'x_init' must be a numeric vector with at least 2 elements.\")\n    if (any(x_init <= lb) || any(x_init >= ub))\n      stop(\"All 'x_init' values must be strictly inside (lb, ub).\")\n  }\n  invisible(TRUE)\n}\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 2: Log-density Evaluation\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\neval_log_density <- function(f, x) {\n  vals <- suppressWarnings(f(x))\n  if (any(is.na(vals) | is.nan(vals)))\n    stop(\"Density function returned NA/NaN.\")\n  ifelse(vals > 0, log(vals), -Inf)\n}\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 3: Log-Concavity Check\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ncheck_log_concavity <- function(x, h) {\n  if (length(x) < 3) return(invisible(TRUE))\n  slopes <- diff(h) / diff(x)\n  if (any(diff(slopes) > 1e-6))\n    stop(\"Log-concavity violated: the supplied density does not appear to be log-concave.\")\n  invisible(TRUE)\n}\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 4: Initialize Abscissae\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ninitialize_abscissae <- function(f, lb, ub, x_init) {\n  if (!is.null(x_init)) {\n    x_init <- sort(unique(x_init))\n    h <- eval_log_density(f, x_init)\n    if (any(h == -Inf))\n      stop(\"Density is zero at one or more initial abscissae. Choose different starting points.\")\n    # Ensure at least 3 points for proper hull construction\n    if (length(x_init) < 3) {\n      mid <- (x_init[1] + x_init[2]) / 2\n      h_mid <- eval_log_density(f, mid)\n      if (h_mid > -Inf) {\n        x_init <- sort(c(x_init, mid))\n        h <- eval_log_density(f, x_init)\n      }\n    }\n    return(list(x = x_init, h = h))\n  }\n\n  # Automatic initialization: find points with positive density\n  if (is.finite(lb) && is.finite(ub)) {\n    candidates <- seq(lb + (ub - lb) * 0.05, ub - (ub - lb) * 0.05, length.out = 20)\n  } else if (is.finite(lb)) {\n    candidates <- lb + c(0.1, 0.5, 1, 2, 5, 10)\n  } else if (is.finite(ub)) {\n    candidates <- ub - c(10, 5, 2, 1, 0.5, 0.1)\n  } else {\n    candidates <- c(-6, -4, -2, -1, -0.5, 0, 0.5, 1, 2, 4, 6)\n  }\n\n  h_cand <- eval_log_density(f, candidates)\n  good <- which(h_cand > -Inf)\n  if (length(good) < 3)\n    stop(\"Could not find at least 3 initial points with positive density. Supply 'x_init'.\")\n\n  sel <- good\n  if (length(sel) > 7)\n    sel <- sel[round(seq(1, length(sel), length.out = 7))]\n\n  x_sel <- candidates[sel]\n  h_sel <- h_cand[sel]\n\n  # For unbounded domains, ensure the boundary slopes have correct sign\n  if (!is.finite(lb) && length(x_sel) >= 2) {\n    slope_left <- (h_sel[2] - h_sel[1]) / (x_sel[2] - x_sel[1])\n    if (slope_left <= 0) {\n      trial <- x_sel[1] - 2 * abs(x_sel[2] - x_sel[1])\n      h_trial <- eval_log_density(f, trial)\n      if (h_trial > -Inf && h_trial < h_sel[1]) {\n        x_sel <- c(trial, x_sel)\n        h_sel <- c(h_trial, h_sel)\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (!is.finite(ub) && length(x_sel) >= 2) {\n    k <- length(x_sel)\n    slope_right <- (h_sel[k] - h_sel[k - 1]) / (x_sel[k] - x_sel[k - 1])\n    if (slope_right >= 0) {\n      trial <- x_sel[k] + 2 * abs(x_sel[k] - x_sel[k - 1])\n      h_trial <- eval_log_density(f, trial)\n      if (h_trial > -Inf && h_trial < h_sel[k]) {\n        x_sel <- c(x_sel, trial)\n        h_sel <- c(h_sel, h_trial)\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (length(x_sel) < 3)\n    stop(\"Could not find at least 3 suitable initial abscissae. Supply 'x_init'.\")\n\n  list(x = x_sel, h = h_sel)\n}\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 5: Upper Hull (Piecewise-Linear Envelope)\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n#\n# For a log-concave function h with abscissae x_1 < ... < x_k:\n# Chord L_j connects (x_j, h_j) and (x_{j+1}, h_{j+1}), slope s_j.\n# By concavity, L_j lies ABOVE h outside [x_j, x_{j+1}] and BELOW inside.\n#\n# Upper hull construction:\n# - Left tail [lb, x_1]:        L_1 (extended left)\n# - [x_1, x_2]:                 L_2 (extended left of x_2)  [k >= 3]\n# - [x_j, x_{j+1}] (interior): min(L_{j-1}, L_{j+1}) split at z_j\n# - [x_{k-1}, x_k]:            L_{k-2} (extended right of x_{k-1})\n# - Right tail [x_k, ub]:       L_{k-1} (extended right)\n\ncompute_upper_hull <- function(x, h, lb, ub) {\n  k <- length(x)\n  s <- diff(h) / diff(x)\n  cc <- h[1:(k - 1)] - s * x[1:(k - 1)]\n\n  p_slopes <- numeric(0)\n  p_intercepts <- numeric(0)\n  p_left <- numeric(0)\n  p_right <- numeric(0)\n\n  add_piece <- function(sl, ic, l, r) {\n    p_slopes <<- c(p_slopes, sl)\n    p_intercepts <<- c(p_intercepts, ic)\n    p_left <<- c(p_left, l)\n    p_right <<- c(p_right, r)\n  }\n\n  # Left tail\n  add_piece(s[1], cc[1], lb, x[1])\n\n  if (k >= 3) {\n    # First boundary interval [x_1, x_2]: use chord L_2\n    add_piece(s[2], cc[2], x[1], x[2])\n\n    # Interior intervals\n    if (k >= 4) {\n      for (j in 2:(k - 2)) {\n        z <- (cc[j + 1] - cc[j - 1]) / (s[j - 1] - s[j + 1])\n        z <- max(z, x[j])\n        z <- min(z, x[j + 1])\n        add_piece(s[j - 1], cc[j - 1], x[j], z)\n        add_piece(s[j + 1], cc[j + 1], z, x[j + 1])\n      }\n    }\n\n    # Last boundary interval [x_{k-1}, x_k]: use chord L_{k-2}\n    add_piece(s[k - 2], cc[k - 2], x[k - 1], x[k])\n  } else {\n    # k == 2: use the single chord for the interior (crude)\n    add_piece(s[1], cc[1], x[1], x[2])\n  }\n\n  # Right tail\n  add_piece(s[k - 1], cc[k - 1], x[k], ub)\n\n  list(\n    slopes = p_slopes, intercepts = p_intercepts,\n    left = p_left, right = p_right,\n    n_pieces = length(p_slopes)\n  )\n}\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 6: Evaluate Upper Hull at a Point\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\neval_upper_hull <- function(t, hull) {\n  for (i in seq_len(hull$n_pieces)) {\n    if (t >= hull$left[i] && t <= hull$right[i]) {\n      return(hull$slopes[i] * t + hull$intercepts[i])\n    }\n  }\n  # Fallback: find closest piece\n  for (i in seq_len(hull$n_pieces)) {\n    if ((i == 1 && t <= hull$right[i]) ||\n        (i == hull$n_pieces && t >= hull$left[i])) {\n      return(hull$slopes[i] * t + hull$intercepts[i])\n    }\n  }\n  return(Inf)\n}\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 7: Lower Hull (Squeezing Function)\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\neval_lower_hull <- function(t, x, h) {\n  k <- length(x)\n  if (t < x[1] || t > x[k]) return(-Inf)\n  j <- findInterval(t, x, rightmost.closed = TRUE)\n  j <- min(j, k - 1)\n  j <- max(j, 1)\n  h[j] + (h[j + 1] - h[j]) / (x[j + 1] - x[j]) * (t - x[j])\n}\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 8: Sample from Upper Hull\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nsample_upper_hull <- function(hull) {\n  np <- hull$n_pieces\n\n  # Compute log-integral of exp(s*t + c) on each piece\n  log_integrals <- numeric(np)\n  for (i in 1:np) {\n    a <- hull$left[i]\n    b <- hull$right[i]\n    si <- hull$slopes[i]\n    ci <- hull$intercepts[i]\n\n    if (!is.finite(a) && !is.finite(b)) {\n      log_integrals[i] <- -Inf\n      next\n    }\n\n    if (abs(si) < 1e-12) {\n      if (is.finite(a) && is.finite(b)) {\n        log_integrals[i] <- ci + log(max(b - a, 1e-300))\n      } else {\n        log_integrals[i] <- -Inf\n      }\n    } else {\n      if (!is.finite(a)) {\n        if (si > 0) {\n          log_integrals[i] <- ci + si * b - log(si)\n        } else {\n          log_integrals[i] <- -Inf\n        }\n      } else if (!is.finite(b)) {\n        if (si < 0) {\n          log_integrals[i] <- ci + si * a - log(-si)\n        } else {\n          log_integrals[i] <- -Inf\n        }\n      } else {\n        # Both finite: integral = exp(ci)/si * [exp(si*b) - exp(si*a)]\n        if (si > 0) {\n          log_integrals[i] <- ci + si * b + log(1 - exp(si * (a - b))) - log(si)\n        } else {\n          log_integrals[i] <- ci + si * a + log(1 - exp(si * (b - a))) - log(-si)\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  # Normalize to get piece probabilities\n  valid <- which(is.finite(log_integrals) & log_integrals > -Inf)\n  if (length(valid) == 0) stop(\"No valid upper hull pieces for sampling.\")\n\n  max_li <- max(log_integrals[valid])\n  weights <- rep(0, np)\n  weights[valid] <- exp(log_integrals[valid] - max_li)\n  probs <- weights / sum(weights)\n\n  # Select piece\n  idx <- sample.int(np, size = 1, prob = probs)\n  a <- hull$left[idx]\n  b <- hull$right[idx]\n  si <- hull$slopes[idx]\n  ci <- hull$intercepts[idx]\n\n  # Sample from truncated exponential on [a, b]\n  u <- runif(1)\n  if (abs(si) < 1e-12) {\n    t_star <- a + u * (b - a)\n  } else {\n    if (!is.finite(a)) {\n      t_star <- b + log(u) / si\n    } else if (!is.finite(b)) {\n      t_star <- a - log(1 - u) / (-si)\n    } else {\n      exp_a <- exp(si * a)\n      exp_b <- exp(si * b)\n      t_star <- log(exp_a + u * (exp_b - exp_a)) / si\n    }\n  }\n\n  log_u_star <- si * t_star + ci\n  list(x_star = t_star, log_u = log_u_star)\n}\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 9: Update Abscissae\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nupdate_abscissae <- function(x_star, h_star, x, h) {\n  pos <- findInterval(x_star, x) + 1\n  x_new <- append(x, x_star, after = pos - 1)\n  h_new <- append(h, h_star, after = pos - 1)\n  list(x = x_new, h = h_new)\n}\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 10: Main ARS Function\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nars <- function(n, f, lb = -Inf, ub = Inf, x_init = NULL) {\n  validate_inputs(n, f, lb, ub, x_init)\n\n  init <- initialize_abscissae(f, lb, ub, x_init)\n  x_abs <- init$x\n  h_abs <- init$h\n  check_log_concavity(x_abs, h_abs)\n\n  samples <- numeric(n)\n  i <- 1\n\n  while (i <= n) {\n    hull <- compute_upper_hull(x_abs, h_abs, lb, ub)\n    proposal <- sample_upper_hull(hull)\n    x_star <- proposal$x_star\n    log_u_star <- proposal$log_u\n\n    l_star <- eval_lower_hull(x_star, x_abs, h_abs)\n    w <- runif(1)\n\n    if (log(w) <= l_star - log_u_star) {\n      samples[i] <- x_star\n      i <- i + 1\n    } else {\n      h_star <- eval_log_density(f, x_star)\n\n      if (log(w) <= h_star - log_u_star) {\n        samples[i] <- x_star\n        i <- i + 1\n      }\n\n      updated <- update_abscissae(x_star, h_star, x_abs, h_abs)\n      x_abs <- updated$x\n      h_abs <- updated$h\n      check_log_concavity(x_abs, h_abs)\n    }\n  }\n\n  samples\n}\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 11: Test Function\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ntest <- function() {\n  cat(\"============================================================\\n\")\n  cat(\"  Adaptive Rejection Sampler (ARS) - Test Suite\\n\")\n  cat(\"============================================================\\n\\n\")\n\n  n_samples <- 5000\n  ks_alpha <- 0.001\n\n  run_distribution_test <- function(test_name, f, lb, ub, ref_cdf,\n                                     true_mean, true_sd, x_init = NULL) {\n    cat(sprintf(\"Testing: %s\\n\", test_name))\n    result <- tryCatch({\n      samples <- ars(n = n_samples, f = f, lb = lb, ub = ub, x_init = x_init)\n      ks <- ks.test(samples, ref_cdf)\n      samp_mean <- mean(samples)\n      samp_sd <- sd(samples)\n      cat(sprintf(\"  Sample mean = %.4f (true = %.4f)\\n\", samp_mean, true_mean))\n      cat(sprintf(\"  Sample SD   = %.4f (true = %.4f)\\n\", samp_sd, true_sd))\n      cat(sprintf(\"  KS p-value  = %.4f\\n\", ks$p.value))\n\n      mean_ok <- abs(samp_mean - true_mean) < 3 * true_sd / sqrt(n_samples) + 0.15\n      sd_ok <- abs(samp_sd - true_sd) / true_sd < 0.25\n      ks_ok <- ks$p.value > ks_alpha\n\n      if (ks_ok && mean_ok && sd_ok) {\n        cat(sprintf(\"%s: PASS\\n\\n\", test_name))\n        list(passed = TRUE, samples = samples)\n      } else {\n        reasons <- c()\n        if (!ks_ok) reasons <- c(reasons, \"KS test rejected\")\n        if (!mean_ok) reasons <- c(reasons, \"mean off\")\n        if (!sd_ok) reasons <- c(reasons, \"SD off\")\n        cat(sprintf(\"%s: FAIL (%s)\\n\\n\", test_name, paste(reasons, collapse = \", \")))\n        list(passed = FALSE, samples = samples)\n      }\n    }, error = function(e) {\n      cat(sprintf(\"  Error: %s\\n\", --------------------------------------------------------------------------"," # Module 2: Log-density Evaluation"," # --------------------------------------------------------------------------"," ","-#' Evaluate the log of the density function safely.","-#' Returns -Inf for zero or negative density values."," eval_log_density <- function(f, x) {","   vals <- suppressWarnings(f(x))","-  if (any(is.na(vals) | is.nan(vals))) {","+  if (any(is.na(vals) | is.nan(vals)))","     stop(\"Density function returned NA/NaN.\")","-  }","   ifelse(vals > 0, log(vals), -Inf)"," }"," ","-"," # --------------------------------------------------------------------------"," # Module 4: Initialize Abscissae"," # --------------------------------------------------------------------------"," ","-#' Choose starting abscissae if not supplied by user.","-#' We need at least two points in the interior of (lb, ub)."," initialize_abscissae <- function(f, lb, ub, x_init) {","   if (!is.null(x_init)) {","-    x_init <- sort(x_init)","+    x_init <- sort(unique(x_init))","     h <- eval_log_density(f, x_init)","-    if (any(h == -Inf)) {","+    if (any(h == -Inf))","       stop(\"Density is zero at one or more initial abscissae. Choose different starting points.\")","+    # Ensure at least 3 points for proper hull construction","+    if (length(x_init) < 3) {","+      mid <- (x_init[1] + x_init[2]) / 2","+      h_mid <- eval_log_density(f, mid)","+      if (h_mid > -Inf) {","+        x_init <- sort(c(x_init, mid))","+        h <- eval_log_density(f, x_init)","+      }","     }","     return(list(x = x_init, h = h))","   }"," ","-  # Automatic initialization: try to find points with positive density","-  # Strategy: try the mode region first via a grid search","+  # Automatic initialization: find points with positive density","   if (is.finite(lb) && is.finite(ub)) {","-    candidates <- seq(lb + (ub - lb) * 0.1, ub - (ub - lb) * 0.1, length.out = 20)","+    candidates <- seq(lb + (ub - lb) * 0.05, ub - (ub - lb) * 0.05, length.out = 20)","   } else if (is.finite(lb)) {","-    candidates <- lb + c(0.5, 1, 2, 5, 10)","+    candidates <- lb + c(0.1, 0.5, 1, 2, 5, 10)","   } else if (is.finite(ub)) {","-    candidates <- ub - c(0.5, 1, 2, 5, 10)","+    candidates <- ub - c(10, 5, 2, 1, 0.5, 0.1)","   } else {","-    candidates <- c(-4, -2, -1, -0.5, 0, 0.5, 1, 2, 4)","+    candidates <- c(-6, -4, -2, -1, -0.5, 0, 0.5, 1, 2, 4, 6)","   }"," ","   h_cand <- eval_log_density(f, candidates)","   good <- which(h_cand > -Inf)","-  if (length(good) < 2) {","-    stop(\"Could not find at least 2 initial points with positive density. Left tail [lb, x_1]:        L_1 (extended left)","+# - [x_1, x_2]:                 L_2 (extended left of x_2)  [k >= 3]","+# - [x_j, x_{j+1}] (interior): min(L_{j-1}, L_{j+1}) split at z_j","+# - [x_{k-1}, x_k]:            L_{k-2} (extended right of x_{k-1})","+# - Right tail [x_k, ub]:       L_{k-1} (extended right)"," ","-#' Compute the upper hull from sorted abscissae x and log-density h.","-#' Returns a list with slopes, intercepts, and intersection points z."," compute_upper_hull <- function(x, h, lb, ub) {","   k <- length(x)","-  # Slopes and intercepts of tangent lines through consecutive pairs","-  slopes <- diff(h) / diff(x)","-  # Each piece j has equation: u_j(t) = h[j] + slopes[j] * (t - x[j])","-  # Or equivalently: u_j(t) = slopes[j] * t + (h[j] - slopes[j] * x[j])","-  intercepts <- h[1:(k - 1)] - slopes * x[1:(k - 1)]","+  s <- diff(h) / diff(x)","+  cc <- h[1:(k - 1)] - s * x[1:(k - 1)]"," ","-  # Intersection points z between consecutive pieces","-  # u_j(z) = u_{j+1}(z)","-  if (k > 2) {","-    z <- numeric(k - 2)","-    for (j in 1:(k - 2)) {","-      if (abs(slopes[j] - slopes[j + 1]) < 1e-15) {","-        z[j] <- (x[j + 1] + x[j]) / 2","-      } else {","-        z[j] <- (intercepts[j + 1] - intercepts[j]) / (slopes[j] - slopes[j + 1])","+  p_slopes <- numeric(0)","+  p_intercepts <- numeric(0)","+  p_left <- numeric(0)","+  p_right <- numeric(0)","+","+  add_piece <- function(sl, ic, l, r) {","+    p_slopes <<- c(p_slopes, sl)","+    p_intercepts <<- c(p_intercepts, ic)","+    p_left <<- c(p_left, l)","+    p_right <<- c(p_right, r)","+  }","+","+  # Left tail","+  add_piece(s[1], cc[1], lb, x[1])","+","+  if (k >= 3) {","+    # First boundary interval [x_1, x_2]: use chord L_2","+    add_piece(s[2], cc[2], x[1], x[2])","+","+    # Interior intervals","+    if (k >= 4) {","+      for (j in 2:(k - 2)) {","+        z <- (cc[j + 1] - cc[j - 1]) / (s[j - 1] - s[j + 1])","+        z <- max(z, x[j])","+        z <- min(z, x[j + 1])","+        add_piece(s[j - 1], cc[j - 1], x[j], z)","+        add_piece(s[j + 1], cc[j + 1], z, x[j + 1])","       }","     }","+","+    # Last boundary interval [x_{k-1}, x_k]: use chord L_{k-2}","+    add_piece(s[k - 2], cc[k - 2], x[k - 1], x[k])","   } else {","-    z <- numeric(0)","+    # k == 2: use the single chord for the interior (crude)","+    add_piece(s[1], cc[1], x[1], x[2])","   }"," ","-  # The full set of breakpoints for the piecewise envelope","-  breaks <- c(lb, z, ub)","+  # Right tail","+  add_piece(s[k - 1], cc[k - 1], x[k], ub)"," ","-  list(slopes = slopes, intercepts = intercepts, z = z, breaks = breaks)","+  list(","+    slopes = p_slopes, intercepts = p_intercepts,","+    left = p_left, right = p_right,","+    n_pieces = length(p_slopes)","+  )"," }"," ","+# --------------------------------------------------------------------------","+# Module 6: Evaluate Upper Hull at a Point","+# --------------------------------------------------------------------------"," ","+eval_upper_hull <- function(t, hull) {","+  for (i in seq_len(hull$n_pieces)) {","+    if (t >= hull$left[i] && t <= hull$right[i]) {","+      return(hull$slopes[i] * t + hull$intercepts[i])","+    }","+  }","+  # Fallback: find closest piece","+  for (i in seq_len(hull$n_pieces)) {","+    if ((i == 1 && t <= hull$right[i]) ||","+        (i == hull$n_pieces && t >= hull$left[i])) {","+      return(hull$slopes[i] * t + hull$intercepts[i])","+    }","+  }","+  return(Inf)","+}","+"," # --------------------------------------------------------------------------","-# Module 6: Lower Hull (Piecewise-Linear Squeezing Function)","+# Module 7: Lower Hull (Squeezing Function)"," # --------------------------------------------------------------------------"," ","-#' Evaluate the lower hull (squeezing function) at point t.","-#' Returns -Inf outside [x[1], x[k]]."," eval_lower_hull <- function(t, x, h) {","   k <- length(x)","   if (t < x[1] || t > x[k]) return(-Inf)","-","-  # Find which segment t falls in","   j <- findInterval(t, x, rightmost.closed = TRUE)","   j <- min(j, k - 1)","   j <- max(j, 1)","-","-  # Linear interpolation","   h[j] + (h[j + 1] - h[j]) / (x[j + 1] - x[j]) * (t - x[j])"," }"," ","-"," # --------------------------------------------------------------------------","-# Module 7: Evaluate Upper Hull at a Point","+# Module 8: Sample from Upper Hull"," # --------------------------------------------------------------------------"," ","-#' Evaluate the upper hull at point t.","-eval_upper_hull <- function(t, hull, x, h) {","-  # Find which piece t belongs to","-  j <- findInterval(t, hull$breaks, rightmost.closed = TRUE)","-  j <- max(1, min(j, length(hull$slopes)))","-  hull$slopes[j] * t + hull$intercepts[j]","-}","+sample_upper_hull <- function(hull) {","+  np <- hull$n_pieces"," ","+  # Compute log-integral of exp(s*t + c) on each piece","+  log_integrals <- numeric(np)","+  for (i in 1:np) {","+    a <- hull$left[i]","+    b <- hull$right[i]","+    si <- hull$slopes[i]","+    ci <- hull$intercepts[i]"," ","-# --------------------------------------------------------------------------","-# Module 8: Sample from the Upper Hull (Piecewise-Exponential)","-# --------------------------------------------------------------------------","+    if (!is.finite(a) && !is.finite(b)) {","+      log_integrals[i] <- -Inf","+      next","+    }"," ","-#' Sample one point from the piecewise-exponential distribution defined","-#' by the upper hull. Only auto-run if sourced with --args test or run directly","-}"]}],"originalFile":"##############################################################################\n# Adaptive Rejection Sampling (ARS)\n# Reference: Gilks, W. R., & Wild, P. (1992). Adaptive rejection sampling\n#            for Gibbs sampling. JRSS Series C, 41(2), 337-348.\n#\n# Modular implementation with input validation and log-concavity checks.\n##############################################################################\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 1: Input Validation\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n#' Validate inputs to the ars() function.\n#' Checks types, ranges, and domain consistency.\nvalidate_inputs <- function(n, f, lb, ub, x_init) {\n  # n must be a positive integer\n  if (!is.numeric(n) || length(n) != 1 || is.na(n)) {\n    stop(\"'n' must be a single numeric value.\")\n  }\n  if (n < 1 || n != floor(n)) {\n    stop(\"'n' must be a positive integer.\")\n  }\n\n  # f must be a function\n  if (!is.function(f)) {\n    stop(\"'f' must be a function (density function).\")\n  }\n\n  # lb and ub must be numeric scalars (may be -Inf / Inf)\n  if (!is.numeric(lb) || length(lb) != 1 || is.na(lb)) {\n    stop(\"'lb' must be a single numeric value (may be -Inf).\")\n  }\n  if (!is.numeric(ub) || length(ub) != 1 || is.na(ub)) {\n    stop(\"'ub' must be a single numeric value (may be Inf).\")\n  }\n  if (lb >= ub) {\n    stop(\"'lb' must be strictly less than 'ub'.\")\n  }\n\n  # x_init validation (if provided)\n  if (!is.null(x_init)) {\n    if (!is.numeric(x_init) || length(x_init) < 2) {\n      stop(\"'x_init' must be a numeric vector with at least 2 elements.\")\n    }\n    if (any(x_init <= lb) || any(x_init >= ub)) {\n      stop(\"All 'x_init' values must be strictly inside (lb, ub).\")\n    }\n  }\n\n  invisible(TRUE)\n}\n\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 2: Log-density Evaluation\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n#' Evaluate the log of the density function safely.\n#' Returns -Inf for zero or negative density values.\neval_log_density <- function(f, x) {\n  vals <- suppressWarnings(f(x))\n  if (any(is.na(vals) | is.nan(vals))) {\n    stop(\"Density function returned NA/NaN.\")\n  }\n  ifelse(vals > 0, log(vals), -Inf)\n}\n\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 3: Log-Concavity Check\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n#' Check log-concavity: for sorted abscissae x with log-density h,\n#' the slopes of the secant lines must be non-increasing.\ncheck_log_concavity <- function(x, h) {\n  if (length(x) < 3) return(invisible(TRUE))\n  slopes <- diff(h) / diff(x)\n  # Allow small numerical tolerance\n  if (any(diff(slopes) > 1e-6)) {\n    stop(\"Log-concavity violated: the supplied density does not appear to be log-concave.\")\n  }\n  invisible(TRUE)\n}\n\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 4: Initialize Abscissae\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n#' Choose starting abscissae if not supplied by user.\n#' We need at least two points in the interior of (lb, ub).\ninitialize_abscissae <- function(f, lb, ub, x_init) {\n  if (!is.null(x_init)) {\n    x_init <- sort(x_init)\n    h <- eval_log_density(f, x_init)\n    if (any(h == -Inf)) {\n      stop(\"Density is zero at one or more initial abscissae. Choose different starting points.\")\n    }\n    return(list(x = x_init, h = h))\n  }\n\n  # Automatic initialization: try to find points with positive density\n  # Strategy: try the mode region first via a grid search\n  if (is.finite(lb) && is.finite(ub)) {\n    candidates <- seq(lb + (ub - lb) * 0.1, ub - (ub - lb) * 0.1, length.out = 20)\n  } else if (is.finite(lb)) {\n    candidates <- lb + c(0.5, 1, 2, 5, 10)\n  } else if (is.finite(ub)) {\n    candidates <- ub - c(0.5, 1, 2, 5, 10)\n  } else {\n    candidates <- c(-4, -2, -1, -0.5, 0, 0.5, 1, 2, 4)\n  }\n\n  h_cand <- eval_log_density(f, candidates)\n  good <- which(h_cand > -Inf)\n  if (length(good) < 2) {\n    stop(\"Could not find at least 2 initial points with positive density. Supply 'x_init'.\")\n  }\n\n  # Pick 2-5 well-spread points with positive density\n  sel <- good\n  if (length(sel) > 5) {\n    sel <- sel[round(seq(1, length(sel), length.out = 5))]\n  }\n\n  x_sel <- candidates[sel]\n  h_sel <- h_cand[sel]\n\n  # Ensure that for unbounded domains, the boundary slopes have correct sign\n  # If lb == -Inf, we need h'(x[1]) > 0 (increasing on the left)\n  # If ub == Inf,  we need h'(x[k]) < 0 (decreasing on the right)\n  if (!is.finite(lb) && length(x_sel) >= 2) {\n    slope_left <- (h_sel[2] - h_sel[1]) / (x_sel[2] - x_sel[1])\n    if (slope_left <= 0) {\n      # Try shifting left point further left\n      trial <- x_sel[1] - abs(x_sel[2] - x_sel[1])\n      h_trial <- eval_log_density(f, trial)\n      if (h_trial > -Inf && h_trial < h_sel[1]) {\n        x_sel <- c(trial, x_sel)\n        h_sel <- c(h_trial, h_sel)\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (!is.finite(ub) && length(x_sel) >= 2) {\n    k <- length(x_sel)\n    slope_right <- (h_sel[k] - h_sel[k - 1]) / (x_sel[k] - x_sel[k - 1])\n    if (slope_right >= 0) {\n      trial <- x_sel[k] + abs(x_sel[k] - x_sel[k - 1])\n      h_trial <- eval_log_density(f, trial)\n      if (h_trial > -Inf && h_trial < h_sel[k]) {\n        x_sel <- c(x_sel, trial)\n        h_sel <- c(h_sel, h_trial)\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  list(x = x_sel, h = h_sel)\n}\n\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 5: Upper Hull (Piecewise-Linear Envelope)\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n#' Compute the upper hull from sorted abscissae x and log-density h.\n#' Returns a list with slopes, intercepts, and intersection points z.\ncompute_upper_hull <- function(x, h, lb, ub) {\n  k <- length(x)\n  # Slopes and intercepts of tangent lines through consecutive pairs\n  slopes <- diff(h) / diff(x)\n  # Each piece j has equation: u_j(t) = h[j] + slopes[j] * (t - x[j])\n  # Or equivalently: u_j(t) = slopes[j] * t + (h[j] - slopes[j] * x[j])\n  intercepts <- h[1:(k - 1)] - slopes * x[1:(k - 1)]\n\n  # Intersection points z between consecutive pieces\n  # u_j(z) = u_{j+1}(z)\n  if (k > 2) {\n    z <- numeric(k - 2)\n    for (j in 1:(k - 2)) {\n      if (abs(slopes[j] - slopes[j + 1]) < 1e-15) {\n        z[j] <- (x[j + 1] + x[j]) / 2\n      } else {\n        z[j] <- (intercepts[j + 1] - intercepts[j]) / (slopes[j] - slopes[j + 1])\n      }\n    }\n  } else {\n    z <- numeric(0)\n  }\n\n  # The full set of breakpoints for the piecewise envelope\n  breaks <- c(lb, z, ub)\n\n  list(slopes = slopes, intercepts = intercepts, z = z, breaks = breaks)\n}\n\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 6: Lower Hull (Piecewise-Linear Squeezing Function)\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n#' Evaluate the lower hull (squeezing function) at point t.\n#' Returns -Inf outside [x[1], x[k]].\neval_lower_hull <- function(t, x, h) {\n  k <- length(x)\n  if (t < x[1] || t > x[k]) return(-Inf)\n\n  # Find which segment t falls in\n  j <- findInterval(t, x, rightmost.closed = TRUE)\n  j <- min(j, k - 1)\n  j <- max(j, 1)\n\n  # Linear interpolation\n  h[j] + (h[j + 1] - h[j]) / (x[j + 1] - x[j]) * (t - x[j])\n}\n\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 7: Evaluate Upper Hull at a Point\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n#' Evaluate the upper hull at point t.\neval_upper_hull <- function(t, hull, x, h) {\n  # Find which piece t belongs to\n  j <- findInterval(t, hull$breaks, rightmost.closed = TRUE)\n  j <- max(1, min(j, length(hull$slopes)))\n  hull$slopes[j] * t + hull$intercepts[j]\n}\n\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 8: Sample from the Upper Hull (Piecewise-Exponential)\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n#' Sample one point from the piecewise-exponential distribution defined\n#' by the upper hull. Also returns the log of the proposal density\n#' (unnormalized) for the acceptance test.\nsample_upper_hull <- function(hull, x, h, lb, ub) {\n  k <- length(hull$slopes)\n  breaks <- hull$breaks\n\n  # Compute (unnormalized) integral of exp(u(t)) on each piece\n  log_integrals <- numeric(k)\n  for (j in 1:k) {\n    a <- breaks[j]\n    b <- breaks[j + 1]\n    sj <- hull$slopes[j]\n    cj <- hull$intercepts[j]\n\n    if (abs(sj) < 1e-12) {\n      # Nearly flat: integral = exp(cj) * (b - a)\n      if (is.finite(a) && is.finite(b)) {\n        log_integrals[j] <- cj + log(b - a)\n      } else {\n        log_integrals[j] <- -Inf  # Improper with zero slope — shouldn't happen if log-concave\n      }\n    } else {\n      # Integral of exp(sj * t + cj) from a to b = exp(cj)/sj * [exp(sj*b) - exp(sj*a)]\n      if (!is.finite(a)) {\n        # a = -Inf: need sj > 0 for convergence\n        if (sj > 0) {\n          log_integrals[j] <- cj + sj * b - log(sj)\n        } else {\n          log_integrals[j] <- -Inf\n        }\n      } else if (!is.finite(b)) {\n        # b = Inf: need sj < 0 for convergence\n        if (sj < 0) {\n          log_integrals[j] <- cj + sj * a - log(-sj)\n        } else {\n          log_integrals[j] <- -Inf\n        }\n      } else {\n        # Both finite\n        log_val_b <- sj * b\n        log_val_a <- sj * a\n        log_diff <- log_val_b + log(1 - exp(log_val_a - log_val_b))\n        if (sj > 0) {\n          log_integrals[j] <- cj + log_diff - log(sj)\n        } else {\n          log_integrals[j] <- cj + log_val_a + log(1 - exp(log_val_b - log_val_a)) - log(-sj)\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  # Normalize to get piece probabilities\n  max_li <- max(log_integrals[is.finite(log_integrals)])\n  weights <- exp(log_integrals - max_li)\n  weights[!is.finite(weights)] <- 0\n  probs <- weights / sum(weights)\n\n  # Select a piece\n  j <- sample.int(k, size = 1, prob = probs)\n\n  a <- breaks[j]\n  b <- breaks[j + 1]\n  sj <- hull$slopes[j]\n  cj <- hull$intercepts[j]\n\n  # Sample from truncated exponential on [a, b] with rate sj\n  u <- runif(1)\n  if (abs(sj) < 1e-12) {\n    # Uniform on [a, b]\n    t_star <- a + u * (b - a)\n  } else {\n    if (!is.finite(a)) {\n      # a = -Inf, sj > 0: CDF = exp(sj*(t - b)), sample: t = b + log(u)/sj\n      t_star <- b + log(u) / sj\n    } else if (!is.finite(b)) {\n      # b = Inf, sj < 0: CDF = 1 - exp(sj*(t - a)), sample: t = a + log(1-u)/sj ...\n      # Actually: t = a - log(1 - u) / (-sj) = a + log(1-u)/sj\n      t_star <- a + log(1 - u) / sj\n    } else {\n      # Inverse CDF for truncated exponential\n      exp_a <- exp(sj * a)\n      exp_b <- exp(sj * b)\n      t_star <- log(exp_a + u * (exp_b - exp_a)) / sj\n    }\n  }\n\n  # Log-density of the upper hull at t_star\n  log_u_star <- sj * t_star + cj\n\n  list(x_star = t_star, log_u = log_u_star)\n}\n\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 9: Update Step (Add New Abscissa)\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n#' Insert a new abscissa into the sorted set and recompute hulls.\nupdate_abscissae <- function(x_star, h_star, x, h) {\n  pos <- findInterval(x_star, x) + 1\n  x_new <- append(x, x_star, after = pos - 1)\n  h_new <- append(h, h_star, after = pos - 1)\n  list(x = x_new, h = h_new)\n}\n\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 10: Main ARS Function\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n#' Adaptive Rejection Sampling\n#'\n#' @param n       Number of samples to draw (positive integer).\n#' @param f       Density function (possibly unnormalized). Must be vectorized.\n#' @param lb      Lower bound of the support (may be -Inf).\n#' @param ub      Upper bound of the support (may be Inf).\n#' @param x_init  Optional numeric vector of initial abscissae (at least 2).\n#'                Must lie strictly inside (lb, ub).\n#' @return Numeric vector of n samples from f.\nars <- function(n, f, lb = -Inf, ub = Inf, x_init = NULL) {\n\n  # --- Step 1: Validate inputs ---\n  validate_inputs(n, f, lb, ub, x_init)\n\n  # --- Step 2: Initialize abscissae ---\n  init <- initialize_abscissae(f, lb, ub, x_init)\n  x_abs <- init$x\n  h_abs <- init$h\n\n  # --- Step 3: Check initial log-concavity ---\n  check_log_concavity(x_abs, h_abs)\n\n  # --- Step 4: Sampling loop ---\n  samples <- numeric(n)\n  i <- 1\n\n  while (i <= n) {\n    # Compute upper hull\n    hull <- compute_upper_hull(x_abs, h_abs, lb, ub)\n\n    # Sample from upper hull\n    proposal <- sample_upper_hull(hull, x_abs, h_abs, lb, ub)\n    x_star <- proposal$x_star\n    log_u_star <- proposal$log_u\n\n    # Evaluate lower hull (squeezing test)\n    l_star <- eval_lower_hull(x_star, x_abs, h_abs)\n\n    w <- runif(1)\n\n    if (log(w) <= l_star - log_u_star) {\n      # Accepted by squeezing test — no density evaluation needed\n      samples[i] <- x_star\n      i <- i + 1\n    } else {\n      # Need to evaluate the true log-density\n      h_star <- eval_log_density(f, x_star)\n\n      if (log(w) <= h_star - log_u_star) {\n        # Accepted by rejection test\n        samples[i] <- x_star\n        i <- i + 1\n      }\n\n      # Update abscissae with the new point\n      updated <- update_abscissae(x_star, h_star, x_abs, h_abs)\n      x_abs <- updated$x\n      h_abs <- updated$h\n\n      # Check log-concavity with new point\n      check_log_concavity(x_abs, h_abs)\n    }\n  }\n\n  samples\n}\n\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Module 11: Test Function\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n#' Run formal tests comparing ARS output against known distributions.\n#' Uses Kolmogorov-Smirnov tests and moment checks.\ntest <- function() {\n  cat(\"============================================================\\n\")\n  cat(\"  Adaptive Rejection Sampler (ARS) — Test Suite\\n\")\n  cat(\"============================================================\\n\\n\")\n\n  n_samples <- 5000\n  ks_alpha <- 0.001  # Very conservative to avoid false failures\n\n  # ------------------------------------------------------------------\n  # Helper: run a single distribution test\n  # ------------------------------------------------------------------\n  run_distribution_test <- function(test_name, f, lb, ub, ref_cdf,\n                                     true_mean, true_sd, x_init = NULL) {\n    cat(sprintf(\"Testing: %s\\n\", test_name))\n\n    result <- tryCatch({\n      samples <- ars(n = n_samples, f = f, lb = lb, ub = ub, x_init = x_init)\n\n      # KS test against reference CDF\n      ks <- ks.test(samples, ref_cdf)\n\n      # Moment checks\n      samp_mean <- mean(samples)\n      samp_sd <- sd(samples)\n\n      cat(sprintf(\"  Sample mean = %.4f (true = %.4f)\\n\", samp_mean, true_mean))\n      cat(sprintf(\"  Sample SD   = %.4f (true = %.4f)\\n\", samp_sd, true_sd))\n      cat(sprintf(\"  KS p-value  = %.4f\\n\", ks$p.value))\n\n      # Pass conditions: KS test not rejected AND moments are reasonable\n      mean_ok <- abs(samp_mean - true_mean) < 3 * true_sd / sqrt(n_samples) + 0.1\n      sd_ok <- abs(samp_sd - true_sd) / true_sd < 0.2\n      ks_ok <- ks$p.value > ks_alpha\n\n      if (ks_ok && mean_ok && sd_ok) {\n        cat(sprintf(\"%s: PASS\\n\\n\", test_name))\n        return(list(passed = TRUE, samples = samples))\n      } else {\n        reasons <- c()\n        if (!ks_ok) reasons <- c(reasons, \"KS test rejected\")\n        if (!mean_ok) reasons <- c(reasons, \"mean off\")\n        if (!sd_ok) reasons <- c(reasons, \"SD off\")\n        cat(sprintf(\"%s: FAIL (%s)\\n\\n\", test_name, paste(reasons, collapse = \", \")))\n        return(list(passed = FALSE, samples = samples))\n      }\n    }, error = function(e) {\n      cat(sprintf(\"  Error: %s\\n\", e$message))\n      cat(sprintf(\"%s: FAIL (error)\\n\\n\", test_name))\n      return(list(passed = FALSE, samples = NULL))\n    })\n\n    result\n  }\n\n  passed <- 0\n  total <- 0\n\n  # ------------------------------------------------------------------\n  # Test 1: Standard Normal N(0,1)\n  # ------------------------------------------------------------------\n  total <- total + 1\n  res <- run_distribution_test(\n    test_name = \"Standard_Normal\",\n    f = dnorm,\n    lb = -Inf, ub = Inf,\n    ref_cdf = pnorm,\n    true_mean = 0, true_sd = 1\n  )\n  if (res$passed) passed <- passed + 1\n  # Save samples\n  if (!is.null(res$samples)) {\n    writeLines(as.character(res$samples), \"/app/normal_samples.txt\")\n  }\n\n  # ------------------------------------------------------------------\n  # Test 2: Normal(3, 2) — shifted/scaled\n  # ------------------------------------------------------------------\n  total <- total + 1\n  res <- run_distribution_test(\n    test_name = \"Normal_mu3_sd2\",\n    f = function(x) dnorm(x, mean = 3, sd = 2),\n    lb = -Inf, ub = Inf,\n    ref_cdf = function(x) pnorm(x, mean = 3, sd = 2),\n    true_mean = 3, true_sd = 2\n  )\n  if (res$passed) passed <- passed + 1\n\n  # ------------------------------------------------------------------\n  # Test 3: Exponential(1) on (0, Inf)\n  # ------------------------------------------------------------------\n  total <- total + 1\n  res <- run_distribution_test(\n    test_name = \"Exponential_rate1\",\n    f = dexp,\n    lb = 0, ub = Inf,\n    ref_cdf = pexp,\n    true_mean = 1, true_sd = 1,\n    x_init = c(0.5, 1, 3)\n  )\n  if (res$passed) passed <- passed + 1\n  # Save exponential samples\n  if (!is.null(res$samples)) {\n    writeLines(as.character(res$samples), \"/app/exponential_samples.txt\")\n  }\n\n  # ------------------------------------------------------------------\n  # Test 4: Gamma(5, 1) — shape > 1, log-concave\n  # ------------------------------------------------------------------\n  total <- total + 1\n  res <- run_distribution_test(\n    test_name = \"Gamma_shape5_rate1\",\n    f = function(x) dgamma(x, shape = 5, rate = 1),\n    lb = 0, ub = Inf,\n    ref_cdf = function(x) pgamma(x, shape = 5, rate = 1),\n    true_mean = 5, true_sd = sqrt(5),\n    x_init = c(1, 3, 5, 8)\n  )\n  if (res$passed) passed <- passed + 1\n\n  # ------------------------------------------------------------------\n  # Test 5: Beta(2, 5) on (0, 1)\n  # ------------------------------------------------------------------\n  total <- total + 1\n  res <- run_distribution_test(\n    test_name = \"Beta_2_5\",\n    f = function(x) dbeta(x, 2, 5),\n    lb = 0, ub = 1,\n    ref_cdf = function(x) pbeta(x, 2, 5),\n    true_mean = 2 / 7, true_sd = sqrt(10 / (49 * 8)),\n    x_init = c(0.1, 0.3, 0.6)\n  )\n  if (res$passed) passed <- passed + 1\n\n  # ------------------------------------------------------------------\n  # Test 6: Truncated Normal on (-2, 2)\n  # ------------------------------------------------------------------\n  total <- total + 1\n  # Truncated N(0,1) on (-2,2): mean=0, sd ~ 0.72\n  Z <- pnorm(2) - pnorm(-2)\n  trunc_sd <- sqrt(1 - 2 * 2 * dnorm(2) / Z)\n  res <- run_distribution_test(\n    test_name = \"Truncated_Normal_-2_2\",\n    f = dnorm,\n    lb = -2, ub = 2,\n    ref_cdf = function(x) {\n      (pnorm(pmin(pmax(x, -2), 2)) - pnorm(-2)) / Z\n    },\n    true_mean = 0, true_sd = trunc_sd,\n    x_init = c(-1, 0, 1)\n  )\n  if (res$passed) passed <- passed + 1\n\n  # ------------------------------------------------------------------\n  # Test 7: Logistic distribution\n  # ------------------------------------------------------------------\n  total <- total + 1\n  res <- run_distribution_test(\n    test_name = \"Logistic_0_1\",\n    f = dlogis,\n    lb = -Inf, ub = Inf,\n    ref_cdf = plogis,\n    true_mean = 0, true_sd = pi / sqrt(3)\n  )\n  if (res$passed) passed <- passed + 1\n\n  # ==================================================================\n  # Input Validation Tests\n  # ==================================================================\n  cat(\"--- Input Validation Tests ---\\n\\n\")\n\n  # Test: negative n\n  total <- total + 1\n  cat(\"Testing: Negative_n_rejected\\n\")\n  tryCatch({\n    ars(n = -5, f = dnorm)\n    cat(\"Negative_n_rejected: FAIL (no error raised)\\n\\n\")\n  }, error = function(e) {\n    cat(sprintf(\"  Caught: %s\\n\", e$message))\n    cat(\"Negative_n_rejected: PASS\\n\\n\")\n    passed <<- passed + 1\n  })\n\n  # Test: non-function f\n  total <- total + 1\n  cat(\"Testing: Non_function_f_rejected\\n\")\n  tryCatch({\n    ars(n = 100, f = \"not_a_function\")\n    cat(\"Non_function_f_rejected: FAIL (no error raised)\\n\\n\")\n  }, error = function(e) {\n    cat(sprintf(\"  Caught: %s\\n\", e$message))\n    cat(\"Non_function_f_rejected: PASS\\n\\n\")\n    passed <<- passed + 1\n  })\n\n  # Test: lb >= ub\n  total <- total + 1\n  cat(\"Testing: Invalid_domain_rejected\\n\")\n  tryCatch({\n    ars(n = 100, f = dnorm, lb = 5, ub = 2)\n    cat(\"Invalid_domain_rejected: FAIL (no error raised)\\n\\n\")\n  }, error = function(e) {\n    cat(sprintf(\"  Caught: %s\\n\", e$message))\n    cat(\"Invalid_domain_rejected: PASS\\n\\n\")\n    passed <<- passed + 1\n  })\n\n  # Test: non-log-concave density (Cauchy)\n  total <- total + 1\n  cat(\"Testing: Non_log_concave_rejected\\n\")\n  tryCatch({\n    ars(n = 100, f = dcauchy, lb = -Inf, ub = Inf, x_init = c(-5, -1, 0, 1, 5))\n    cat(\"Non_log_concave_rejected: FAIL (no error raised)\\n\\n\")\n  }, error = function(e) {\n    cat(sprintf(\"  Caught: %s\\n\", e$message))\n    cat(\"Non_log_concave_rejected: PASS\\n\\n\")\n    passed <<- passed + 1\n  })\n\n  # Test: n = 0\n  total <- total + 1\n  cat(\"Testing: Zero_n_rejected\\n\")\n  tryCatch({\n    ars(n = 0, f = dnorm)\n    cat(\"Zero_n_rejected: FAIL (no error raised)\\n\\n\")\n  }, error = function(e) {\n    cat(sprintf(\"  Caught: %s\\n\", e$message))\n    cat(\"Zero_n_rejected: PASS\\n\\n\")\n    passed <<- passed + 1\n  })\n\n  # Test: x_init outside domain\n  total <- total + 1\n  cat(\"Testing: Init_outside_domain_rejected\\n\")\n  tryCatch({\n    ars(n = 100, f = dnorm, lb = 0, ub = 10, x_init = c(-1, 5))\n    cat(\"Init_outside_domain_rejected: FAIL (no error raised)\\n\\n\")\n  }, error = function(e) {\n    cat(sprintf(\"  Caught: %s\\n\", e$message))\n    cat(\"Init_outside_domain_rejected: PASS\\n\\n\")\n    passed <<- passed + 1\n  })\n\n  # ==================================================================\n  # Module Tests\n  # ==================================================================\n  cat(\"--- Module Tests ---\\n\\n\")\n\n  # Test: upper/lower hull evaluation\n  total <- total + 1\n  cat(\"Testing: Hull_evaluation\\n\")\n  tryCatch({\n    x_test <- c(-2, -1, 0, 1, 2)\n    h_test <- eval_log_density(dnorm, x_test)\n    hull <- compute_upper_hull(x_test, h_test, -Inf, Inf)\n\n    # Upper hull must be >= log-density at all abscissae\n    for (xi in seq(-3, 3, by = 0.5)) {\n      u_val <- eval_upper_hull(xi, hull, x_test, h_test)\n      h_val <- eval_log_density(dnorm, xi)\n      if (u_val < h_val - 1e-6) {\n        stop(sprintf(\"Upper hull below log-density at x=%.2f: u=%.4f < h=%.4f\", xi, u_val, h_val))\n      }\n    }\n\n    # Lower hull must be <= log-density at interior points\n    for (xi in seq(-1.5, 1.5, by = 0.5)) {\n      l_val <- eval_lower_hull(xi, x_test, h_test)\n      h_val <- eval_log_density(dnorm, xi)\n      if (l_val > h_val + 1e-6) {\n        stop(sprintf(\"Lower hull above log-density at x=%.2f: l=%.4f > h=%.4f\", xi, l_val, h_val))\n      }\n    }\n\n    cat(\"  Upper hull >= log-density: OK\\n\")\n    cat(\"  Lower hull <= log-density: OK\\n\")\n    cat(\"Hull_evaluation: PASS\\n\\n\")\n    passed <<- passed + 1\n  }, error = function(e) {\n    cat(sprintf(\"  Error: %s\\n\", e$message))\n    cat(\"Hull_evaluation: FAIL\\n\\n\")\n  })\n\n  # Test: log-concavity detection\n  total <- total + 1\n  cat(\"Testing: Log_concavity_detection\\n\")\n  tryCatch({\n    # Non-log-concave: bimodal mixture\n    x_bimodal <- c(-3, -1, 0, 1, 3)\n    h_bimodal <- log(0.5 * dnorm(x_bimodal, -2) + 0.5 * dnorm(x_bimodal, 2))\n\n    err_caught <- FALSE\n    tryCatch({\n      check_log_concavity(x_bimodal, h_bimodal)\n    }, error = function(e) {\n      err_caught <<- TRUE\n    })\n\n    if (err_caught) {\n      cat(\"  Bimodal density correctly rejected\\n\")\n      cat(\"Log_concavity_detection: PASS\\n\\n\")\n      passed <<- passed + 1\n    } else {\n      cat(\"  Bimodal density was NOT rejected\\n\")\n      cat(\"Log_concavity_detection: FAIL\\n\\n\")\n    }\n  }, error = function(e) {\n    cat(sprintf(\"  Error: %s\\n\", e$message))\n    cat(\"Log_concavity_detection: FAIL\\n\\n\")\n  })\n\n  # Test: update_abscissae maintains sorted order\n  total <- total + 1\n  cat(\"Testing: Update_abscissae_sorted\\n\")\n  tryCatch({\n    x0 <- c(1, 3, 5, 7)\n    h0 <- c(-1, -0.5, -0.5, -1)\n    upd <- update_abscissae(4, -0.6, x0, h0)\n    if (all(diff(upd$x) > 0) && length(upd$x) == 5 && upd$x[3] == 4) {\n      cat(\"  Sorted order maintained after insertion\\n\")\n      cat(\"Update_abscissae_sorted: PASS\\n\\n\")\n      passed <<- passed + 1\n    } else {\n      cat(\"Update_abscissae_sorted: FAIL\\n\\n\")\n    }\n  }, error = function(e) {\n    cat(sprintf(\"  Error: %s\\n\", e$message))\n    cat(\"Update_abscissae_sorted: FAIL\\n\\n\")\n  })\n\n  # ==================================================================\n  # Summary\n  # ==================================================================\n  cat(\"============================================================\\n\")\n  cat(sprintf(\"  Results: %d / %d tests passed\\n\", passed, total))\n  cat(\"============================================================\\n\")\n\n  invisible(passed == total)\n}\n\n\n# Run tests if this script is executed directly\nif (!interactive() && identical(sys.frame(1)$ofile, NULL)) {\n  # Only auto-run if sourced with --args test or run directly\n}\n"}}
